name: Arizer Glass Mini Whip
summary: Arizer Glass Mini Whip — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer Glass Mini Whip has the same measurements and function as the unit attachment included with the Arizer Extreme Q, and is used to connect to balloons. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
